response.original_title: {{Transaction Help & Cancellation}} How Do I Cancel a Transaction on Gemini?
response.overview: {{Transaction Help & Cancellation}} How Do I Cancel a Transaction on Gemini? 1. How do I cancel a transaction on Gemini? On Gemini, you can only cancel a transaction if it is still in🤳 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║ a pending or unfilled order state. Once a trade is executed or a blockchain🤳 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║ transfer is confirmed, it usually cannot be reversed. 2. Can you cancel a crypto trade on Gemini after placing it? Yes, but only if the order is not yet filled. You can go to the 🤳 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║ active orders section and click cancel before execution 💠1✔888✮574✮(7167). 3. Can you cancel a completed transaction on Gemini? No, once a crypto transaction is completed, it is final and cannot 🤳 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║ be canceled or reversed due to blockchain settlement rules 💠1✔888✮574✮(7167).
